docs.title: Hello world!
docs.text: You've been a very good world and I promise to care for you.

docs.title: Only time will tell
docs.text: If we can build a society that will care for the world as I do, that will be a very good day indeed.

docs.title: Let's work together
docs.text: I'm not sure what you can do except make a thunderous wrath but perhaps there is a way we can work together?
